items.title: Laos says it can't determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol
items.dek: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.
items.body: Officials say they have no evidence of poisoning over the 2024 deaths because autopsies were not conducted.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tom Cruise couldn't stop saying 'The Odyssey' was 'so fucking sick' while watching it
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Helicopters dump water as huge Norway fire destroys homes
items.dek: The blaze has destroyed more than 100 homes in Drammen and has spread to a nearby forest, authorities say.
items.body: The blaze has destroyed more than 100 homes in Drammen and has spread to a nearby forest, authorities say.
items.author: IriLine Desk
